logger.doc:name: Log Salesforce Connectivity Error
logger.message: #[output application/json ---{ 'errorType': error.errorType.identifier, 'timestamp': now(), 'transactionId': correlationId, 'flow': flow.name, 'message': error.description }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "statusCode": 503, "message": "Salesforce Service Unavailable", "errorCode": error.errorType.identifier, "timestamp": now(), "transactionId": correlationId, "details": "Unable to connect to Salesforce. Please try again later." }

logger.doc:name: Log Salesforce Data Error
logger.message: #[output application/json ---{ 'errorType': error.errorType.identifier, 'timestamp': now(), 'transactionId': correlationId, 'flow': flow.name, 'message': error.description }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "statusCode": 400, "message": "Invalid Salesforce Data Request", "errorCode": error.errorType.identifier, "timestamp": now(), "transactionId": correlationId, "details": if (error.errorType.identifier contains "MALFORMED_QUERY") "The SOQL query is malformed" else if (error.errorType.identifier contains "INVALID_FIELD") "One or more fields don't exist in Salesforce" else if (error.errorType.identifier contains "INVALID_TYPE") "Invalid object type specified" else "Invalid input data for Salesforce operation" }

logger.doc:name: Log Rate Limit Error
logger.message: #[output application/json ---{ 'errorType': error.errorType.identifier, 'timestamp': now(), 'transactionId': correlationId, 'flow': flow.name, 'message': 'Salesforce rate limit exceeded' }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "statusCode": 429, "message": "Too Many Requests - Salesforce Rate Limit Exceeded", "errorCode": error.errorType.identifier, "timestamp": now(), "transactionId": correlationId, "details": "Salesforce API rate limit has been exceeded. Please retry after some time." }

logger.doc:name: Log Operation Error
logger.message: #[output application/json ---{ 'errorType': error.errorType.identifier, 'timestamp': now(), 'transactionId': correlationId, 'flow': flow.name, 'message': error.description }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "statusCode": 501, "message": "Operation Not Supported", "errorCode": error.errorType.identifier, "timestamp": now(), "transactionId": correlationId, "details": "The requested operation is not supported in Salesforce or has been disabled" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "statusCode": 413, "message": "Payload Too Large", "errorCode": "STREAM_MAXIMUM_SIZE_EXCEEDED", "timestamp": now(), "transactionId": correlationId, "details": "The request payload exceeds the maximum allowed size" }

logger.doc:name: Log Request Timeout
logger.message: #[output application/json ---{ 'errorType': 'HTTP_TIMEOUT', 'timestamp': now(), 'transactionId': correlationId, 'flow': flow.name, 'message': 'External HTTP request timeout' }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "statusCode": 504, "message": "Gateway Timeout", "errorCode": "HTTP:TIMEOUT", "timestamp": now(), "transactionId": correlationId, "details": "The external service did not respond within the expected timeframe" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "statusCode": 502, "message": "Bad Gateway - Service Unavailable", "errorCode": "HTTP:CONNECTIVITY", "timestamp": now(), "transactionId": correlationId, "details": "Unable to connect to the external service" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "statusCode": 400, "message": "Bad Request - Malformed Request", "errorCode": "HTTP:BAD_REQUEST", "timestamp": now(), "transactionId": correlationId, "details": "The external service received a malformed request" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "statusCode": 401, "message": "Unauthorized - Invalid Credentials", "errorCode": "HTTP:UNAUTHORIZED", "timestamp": now(), "transactionId": correlationId, "details": "The external service requires valid authentication" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "statusCode": 403, "message": "Forbidden - Access Denied", "errorCode": "HTTP:FORBIDDEN", "timestamp": now(), "transactionId": correlationId, "details": "Access to the external resource is forbidden" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "statusCode": 404, "message": "Not Found - Resource Not Available", "errorCode": "HTTP:NOT_FOUND", "timestamp": now(), "transactionId": correlationId, "details": "The requested external resource was not found" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "statusCode": 429, "message": "Too Many Requests - Rate Limit Exceeded", "errorCode": "HTTP:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS", "timestamp": now(), "transactionId": correlationId, "details": "The external service rate limit has been exceeded" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "statusCode": 502, "message": "Bad Gateway - External Server Error", "errorCode": "HTTP:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR", "timestamp": now(), "transactionId": correlationId, "details": "The external service encountered an internal server error" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "statusCode": 503, "message": "Service Unavailable", "errorCode": "HTTP:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE", "timestamp": now(), "transactionId": correlationId, "details": "The external service is temporarily unavailable" }

logger.doc:name: Log Unhandled Error
logger.message: #[output application/json ---{ 'errorType': error.errorType.identifier, 'timestamp': now(), 'transactionId': correlationId, 'flow': flow.name, 'message': error.message default error.description, 'namespace': error.errorType.namespace, 'causeException': error.cause.message default 'N/A' }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "statusCode": 500, "message": "Internal Server Error", "errorCode": "INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR", "timestamp": now(), "transactionId": correlationId, "details": "An unexpected error occurred. Please contact support with transaction ID: " ++ correlationId }
